invariants.statement: Gemini session files are a single JSON object with sessionId, projectHash, startTime, lastUpdated, kind, summary, and a messages array. The CLI expects all top-level fields to be present; dropping any of them may break resume.
Each message has a stable id used for diffing across session versions. Removing messages must preserve the remaining ids; renumbering would break version comparison.
